# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

Write secure code.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "2.1"

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
        - https://*.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Language
        - Content-Language
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Requested-With
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Total-Count
        - X-Response-Time
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
    enabled: true

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_name: X-API-Key
      hide_credentials: true
      anonymous: ""
      run_on_preflight: true
    enabled: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000
      limit_by: consumer
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      sync_rate: -1
      redis:
        host: redis
        port: 6379
        password: "secure_redis_password"
        database: 0
        timeout: 2000
    enabled: true

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
        enabled: true
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500
          limit_by: consumer
          policy: redis
        enabled: true

routes:
  - name: user-api
    paths:
      - /api/users
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
            - https://admin.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
            - X-API-Key
        enabled: true
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 200
          limit_by: consumer
          policy: redis
        enabled: true
